title: Data Structure and Algorithm Design Capstone · Invariant Lens: Workload Analysis
summary: Design a dispatch index for mixed lookup, priority, path, and update workloads. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa workload analysis increment in a defended multi-structure dispatch system. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Translate operation frequency, scale, latency, memory, and consistency needs into structure criteria.
Require correctness equivalence and measured stakeholder benefit before keeping an optimization.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
